description_long: This is a retro-style portable radio receiver with a rectangular body, predominantly colored in red and blue, and featuring a large black circular speaker grille on the front. The top of the radio has two round dials, likely for tuning and volume control, and a series of rectangular buttons or sliders. A sturdy, dark handle arches over the top, making it easy to carry. The back panel is blue and adorned with several stickers, ventilation slits, and a few small labels, adding a touch of urban character. The sides are relatively plain, with the right side showing a protruding knob and the left side being mostly flat. The front face also includes a blue-tinted window, possibly for a frequency indicator or cassette slot.
description: A retro portable radio receiver with a red and blue body, black speaker grille, top dials, and a sturdy handle. The back features stickers and ventilation slits, giving it an urban, well-used look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black speaker grille, blue window, two dials, and the handle arching above.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the protruding knob and the slim profile of the radio.
description_view_2: Back view displaying blue paneling, ventilation slits, and several colorful stickers and labels.
description_view_3: Left side view showing a flat, red surface with minimal features and the handle's attachment.
